Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:1950年代の各国]] [[ar:Category:عقد 1950 حسب البلد]] [[ary:Category:عوام 1950 على حساب لبلاد]] [[az:Category:1950-ci illərdə ölkələr]] [[be_x_old:Category:1950-я паводле краінаў]] [[be:Category:1950-я паводле краін]] [[bg:Category:1950-те по страна]] [[bn:Category:দেশ অনুযায়ী ১৯৫০-এর দশক]] [[bs:Category:1950-e po državama]] [[ckb:Category:دەیەی ١٩٥٠ بەپێی وڵات]] [[commons:Category:1950s by country]] [[cy:Category:1950au yn ôl gwlad]] [[da:Category:1950'erne efter land]] [[eo:Category:1950-1959 laŭ landoj]] [[es:Category:Países en los años 1950]] [[fa:Category:دهه ۱۹۵۰ (میلادی) بر پایه کشور]] [[fr:Category:Années 1950 par pays]] [[gv:Category:1950yn rere çheer]] [[hy:Category:1950-ականներ ըստ երկրի]] [[ka:Category:1950-იანი წლები ქვეყნების მიხედვით]] [[ko:Category:나라별 1950년대]] [[ku:Category:1950î li gorî welatan]] [[mk:Category:Земјите во 1950-тите]] [[nn:Category:1950-åra etter land]] [[no:Category:1950-årene etter land]] [[pt:Category:Década de 1950 por país]] [[ro:Category:Anii 1950 după țară]] [[ru:Category:1950-е годы по странам]] [[simple:Category:1950s by country]] [[smn:Category:1950-loho staatâ mield]] [[sq:Category:Vitet 1950 sipas shteteve]] [[sv:Category:1950-talet efter land]] [[tr:Category:Ülkelere göre 1950'ler]] [[uk:Category:1950-ті за країною]] [[ur:Category:1950ء کی دہائی بلحاظ ملک]] [[vi:Category:Thập niên 1950 theo quốc gia]] [[zh:Category:1950年代各國]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:1950s_in_Japan]].

revision.comment: Bot: log revisions ≥ 2025-05-13 with full text
revision.text:
==Revision (2025-05-16T01:12:42Z): (Bot: update category metadata)== [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:1950年代の各国]] [[ar:Category:عقد 1950 حسب البلد]] [[ary:Category:عوام 1950 على حساب لبلاد]] [[az:Category:1950-ci illərdə ölkələr]] [[be_x_old:Category:1950-я паводле краінаў]] [[be:Category:1950-я паводле краін]] [[bg:Category:1950-те по страна]] [[bn:Category:দেশ অনুযায়ী ১৯৫০-এর দশক]] [[bs:Category:1950-e po državama]] [[ckb:Category:دەیەی ١٩٥٠ بەپێی وڵات]] [[commons:Category:1950s by country]] [[cy:Category:1950au yn ôl gwlad]] [[da:Category:1950'erne efter land]] [[eo:Category:1950-1959 laŭ landoj]] [[es:Category:Países en los años 1950]] [[fa:Category:دهه ۱۹۵۰ (میلادی) بر پایه کشور]] [[fr:Category:Années 1950 par pays]] [[gv:Category:1950yn rere çheer]] [[hy:Category:1950-ականներ ըստ երկրի]] [[ka:Category:1950-იანი წლები ქვეყნების მიხედვით]] [[ko:Category:나라별 1950년대]] [[ku:Category:1950î li gorî welatan]] [[mk:Category:Земјите во 1950-тите]] [[nn:Category:1950-åra etter land]] [[no:Category:1950-årene etter land]] [[pt:Category:Década de 1950 por país]] [[ro:Category:Anii 1950 după țară]] [[ru:Category:1950-е годы по странам]] [[simple:Category:1950s by country]] [[smn:Category:1950-loho staatâ mield]] [[sq:Category:Vitet 1950 sipas shteteve]] [[sv:Category:1950-talet efter land]] [[tr:Category:Ülkelere göre 1950'ler]] [[uk:Category:1950-ті за країною]] [[ur:Category:1950ء کی دہائی بلحاظ ملک]] [[vi:Category:Thập niên 1950 theo quốc gia]] [[zh:Category:1950年代各國]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:1950s_in_Japan]].

[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:1950年代の各国]] [[ar:Category:عقد 1950 حسب البلد]] [[ary:Category:عوام 1950 على حساب لبلاد]] [[az:Category:1950-ci illərdə ölkələr]] [[be:Category:1950-я паводле краін]] [[bg:Category:1950-те по страна]] [[bn:Category:দেশ অনুযায়ী ১৯৫০-এর দশক]] [[bs:Category:1950-e po državama]] [[ckb:Category:دەیەی ١٩٥٠ بەپێی وڵات]] [[commons:Category:1950s by country]] [[cy:Category:1950au yn ôl gwlad]] [[da:Category:1950'erne efter land]] [[eo:Category:1950-1959 laŭ landoj]] [[es:Category:Países en los años 1950]] [[fa:Category:دهه ۱۹۵۰ (میلادی) بر پایه کشور]] [[fr:Category:Années 1950 par pays]] [[gv:Category:1950yn rere çheer]] [[hy:Category:1950-ականներ ըստ երկրի]] [[ka:Category:1950-იანი წლები ქვეყნების მიხედვით]] [[ko:Category:나라별 1950년대]] [[ku:Category:1950î li gorî welatan]] [[mk:Category:Земјите во 1950-тите]] [[nn:Category:1950-åra etter land]] [[no:Category:1950-årene etter land]] [[pt:Category:Década de 1950 por país]] [[ro:Category:Anii 1950 după țară]] [[ru:Category:1950-е годы по странам]] [[simple:Category:1950s by country]] [[smn:Category:1950-loho staatâ mield]] [[sq:Category:Vitet 1950 sipas shteteve]] [[sv:Category:1950-talet efter land]] [[tr:Category:Ülkelere göre 1950'ler]] [[uk:Category:1950-ті за країною]] [[ur:Category:1950ء کی دہائی بلحاظ ملک]] [[vi:Category:Thập niên 1950 theo quốc gia]] [[zh:Category:1950年代各國]] [[en:Category:1950s by country]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "[[be_x_old:" to "[[sn:be_x_old:"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Bot: add [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category}} {{Decade by country category header}}
[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:Category:1950s by country]][[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:Category:1950s by country]][[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:Category:1950s by country]][[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:Category:1950s by country]] [[en:Category:1950s by country]] [[en:Category:1950s by country]] [[en:Category:1950s by country]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8144441)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8144441)
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Commons category}}
{{Decade by country category header}}
{{wikidata link|Q8144441}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:1950s by country]]
<!--categories-->

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1950s_by_country here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

<!--templates-->
{{Commons category}}
{{Decade by country category header}}
{{wikidata link|Q8144441}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:1950s by country]]
<!--categories-->
